Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Event Log: Lets go through each case and identify recurring activities. Case C001: Verify Documents appears twice. Case C002: Call Customer appears twice. Case C003: Verify Documents appears twice.

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Interpret Contextual Differences: Verify Documents first occurrence initial check verification. Second occurrence recheck after additional info. Call Customer first clarify discrepancy second follow up confirm.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Devise New Names: Verify Documents Initial Document Verification Document Re verification. Call Customer Call Customer Clarification Call Customer Follow up.

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Map them out carefully for each case. Check formatting and consistency. Self Correction Refinement: Keep base name consistent with suffixes.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND

Name: Backtracking - PE
